specific_question: When was the last time that the cybersecurity department mapped out security controls in MediConn’s virtual healthcare platform in accordance with the HHS Cybersecurity Performance Goals (CPGs)?
answer: The cybersecurity specialist at MediConn began drafting a control-mapping matrix for security controls within MediConn’s virtual healthcare platform in August of 2025. The main goal was to align core safeguards such as authentication, encryption, and incident response with HHS CPG requirements.
dr_question: By Q4 2025, how can MediConn Solutions integrate the HHS Cybersecurity Performance Goals (CPGs) into its virtual healthcare platform to ensure compliance for both internal systems and third-party vendors, while effectively mitigating emerging cyber threats?
